title: Nordea to Cut Up to 5% of Staff as AI Drives Savings
description: Nordea Bank Abp is putting as many as 1,500 jobs at risk as it expects artificial intelligence to make processes more efficient and cut costs.

title: Ex-Datadog Leader’s AI Startup Nabs First $49 Million Funding
description: The deal is Iconiq’s first-ever startup incubation.

title: Nebius Plans to Raise $3.75 Billion in Debt After Meta Deal
description: Artificial intelligence data center developer Nebius Group NV said it intends to raise about $3.75 billion in convertible debt on the heels of a commercial deal with Meta Platforms Inc.
